nasb.text: Yet they are Your people, even Your inheritance, whom You have brought out by Your great power and Your outstretched arm.’

esv.text: For they are your people and your heritage, whom you brought out by your great power and by your outstretched arm.’

cnv.text: 但是，他們是你的子民，是你的產業，又是你藉著大能和伸出來的膀臂領出來的。’”

ccb.text: 他们毕竟是你的子民，你的产业，是你伸出大能的臂膀从埃及带出来的。’
